title: comandra umbellata subsp. californica
intro: Comandra umbellata subsp. californica, also known as California comandra or bearberry, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the family Santalaceae. Traditionally used in Native American medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as supporting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Comandra umbellata subsp. californica can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential interactions with other medications and its limited scientific research.
